title: petasites × sabaudus
intro: Petasites × sabaudus, also known as butterbur, is a hybrid plant in the Petasites genus, derived from the cross between Petasites officinalis and Petasites japonicus. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which help to reduce pain and alleviate symptoms associated with migraines and other health conditions. The health benefits of Petasites × sabaudus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as a natural anti-histamine. Herbal preparations of butterbur can be found in the form of dried leaves, capsules, or extracts, often standardized to contain a specific amount of sesquiterpenes, which are the active compounds responsible for its medicinal properties.
